1.text: New consolidation area with an air bronchogram medial to the previously defined consolidation area in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

2.text: Regression in the tree-in-bud appearance observed in the caudal portion of the anterior segment

3.text: Heterogeneity with regression in the tree-in-bud pattern and newly developing areas in the superior segment of the lower lobe

4.text: Ectasia in the peripheral bronchiolar branches in the superior segment of the lower lobe

5.text: Focal tree-in-bud appearance in the inferior lingular segment of the left lung

6.text: Tree-in-bud appearance and slight consolidation at the anteromedial basal level, consistent with previous examinations

7.text: Stable tree-in-bud appearance in the apicoposterior segment

8.text: Tree-in-bud appearance in the superior segment of the lower lobe, consistent with previous examinations

9.text: Stable cavitation in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe compared to the previous examination

10.text: Prominent consolidation areas in both lungs, particularly in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

11.text: Diffuse pneumonic infiltration in both lungs
